title: thelypteris obliquata
intro: Thelypteris obliquata, also known as the autumn fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris obliquata include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Thelypteris obliquata can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, to harness its medicinal properties.
